title: Villa in Palm Springs · ★5.0 · 3 bedrooms · 3 beds · 2.5 baths
description: Welcome to The Palm Springs Modern Villa, an exclusive and iconic retreat nestled in the heart of Palm Springs. Crafted by the renowned architectur...

amenity_groups.title: Bedroom and laundry
items: Essentials - Towels, bed sheets, soap, and toilet paper

amenity_groups.title: Entertainment
items: Theme room - A room or multiple spaces that are designed to follow the same theme

amenity_groups.title: Family
items: Pack ’n play/Travel crib - always at the listing
Children’s books and toys for ages 0-2 years old, 2-5 years old, 5-10 years old, and 10+ years old
Baby monitor - always at the listing
Children's playroom - An indoor room with toys, books, and games for children
Outdoor playground - An outdoor area equipped with play structures for children

amenity_groups.title: Home safety
items:
Exterior security cameras on property - For your safety and the security of the home when it is unoccupied, there are security cameras which monitor the driveway and backyard pool areas. 
Rest assured, these cameras are not monitored while guests are present. Please note that there are no cameras or recording devices inside of the home.

amenity_groups.title: Kitchen and dining
items: Kitchen - Space where guests can cook their own meals
Cooking basics - Pots and pans, oil, salt and pepper
Dishes and silverware - Bowls, chopsticks, plates, cups, etc.
Coffee maker: drip coffee maker, french press, Keurig coffee machine
Barbecue utensils - Grill, charcoal, bamboo skewers/iron skewers, etc.

amenity_groups.title: Location features
items: Private entrance - Separate street or building entrance

amenity_groups.title: Outdoor
items: Private backyard - An open space on the property usually covered in grass

amenity_groups.title: Parking and facilities
items: EV charger - level 2, tesla only - 220 volts, 12-35 miles per hour
Single level home - No stairs in home

amenity_groups.title: Services
items: Luggage dropoff allowed - For guests' convenience when they have early arrival or late departure
Long term stays allowed - Allow stay for 28 days or more
